sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79730" key="paromoia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρομοι-άζω</orth>, <sense id="n79730.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be like</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τισι</itype> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg001.perseus-grc1:23:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ev.Matt.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
